message:
refactor(fmt): apply rustfmt canonical formatting across crates

Reformat code in fj-ad, fj-core, fj-egraph, fj-interpreters, and fj-lax
to match rustfmt canonical style: reorder imports alphabetically, collapse
single-element vec! macro expressions, normalize trailing commas, expand
compressed array literals to one-per-line, and unwrap unnecessarily split
method chains.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
